metadata.description: AI-powered build-duty workflows for .NET source-build infrastructure

plugins.name: triage
plugins.description: Signal collection, pipeline/issue/PR analysis, and incident reconciliation for build-duty triage.

plugins.name: reporting
plugins.description: Triage summaries, incident timelines, trend reports, and rotation handoff documentation.

plugins.name: remediation
plugins.description: Automated fixes — retrying builds, filing issues, updating baselines, and posting comments.

plugins.name: config-management
plugins.description: Creating, validating, and managing .build-duty.yml configs — adding pipelines, onboarding repos.
